contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Hi everyone, glad to be here, and thanks for the welcome!
  
  I’m Marcello, based in Switzerland. I run Common Synapse:  I help pre-market biotechs validate their science through what patients openly say online, turning unprompted and unstructured public conversations into patient insight. Mostly across neurology, rare disease and immunology, after about a decade at Novartis and Biogen. 
  
  I’ve kept a pulse on APAC throughout my career and would love to grow into the Singapore market, so I’m really glad to be part of this group.
  
  Outside work I make 100% dark chocolate (in Switzerland) and produce olive oil on family land (in Italy), so I’m always happy to talk cocoa or olives with anyone here :)
  
  Looking forward to connecting with you all!
  Marcello
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Jonathan
